'''O-Rina''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], one of two [[Hospitality Guide]]s who introduced [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] to the planet of [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]. Her male counterpart was [[V-Haad]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' {{1st}}
